examples: US planemaker Boeing has reported a 20% rise in second-quarter profit and raised its earnings forecast for 2011.
The planemaker announced a third delay to its 787 Dreamliner on Wednesday, confirming customers' fears.
Boeing received 802 orders for the Dreamliner by the start of 2008, making it the planemaker's fastest selling model.
The European planemaker said it would use traditional nickel-cadmium batteries instead, as already used in the A380 and other models.
